data.name: ExecutorControl
data.value: A fake letter from management has been sent. Let's see how they carry out someone else's orders...

data.name: ExecutorFireImmune
data.value: You prepared irrefutable incriminating evidence against the target, but the lawyers rejected it because of the "golden parachute" in the target's contract.

data.name: ExecutorInvestigateRole
data.value: According to the closed staffing table, this person is {0}

data.name: ExecutorSecurityDetectDangerous
data.value: The logs don't lie. This employee is either working for competitors or pursuing personal agendas.

data.name: ExecutorSecurityDetectPeaceful
data.value: The verification has been passed. The employee is loyal to the Corporation.

data.name: ExecutorShadowDirectorFail
data.value: The candidate proved too principled and refused "dirty" money. He might become a problem.

data.name: ExecutorShadowDirectorSuccess
data.value: The Syndicate's offer has been accepted. We have a new agent within the Corporation.

data.name: ExecutorStartupFounderFail
data.value: The candidate turned out to be too attached to a stable salary and bonuses.

data.name: ExecutorStartupFounderSuccess
data.value: You've successfully sold the "unicorn" idea. Another cog in the system has become a freelance creator.

data.name: AllSuicide
data.value: This morning, everyone saw a farewell message in the company chat. One of the colleagues had lost their temper and quit overnight.

data.name: AllSwapIncident
data.value: Jira experienced a massive outage. Someone fired themselves due to the incredible confusion in tickets!

data.name: TargetControl
data.value: You received an urgent and extremely strange order from your superiors via messenger. You couldn't disobey, so you had to put everything you had planned aside and carry it out.

data.name: TargetShadowDirectorFail
data.value: A very strange and highly illegal collaboration proposal arrived in your work email, which you immediately marked as spam.

data.name: TargetShadowDirectorSuccess
data.value: You've been made an offer you can't refuse. Large sums of money in exchange for a small favor. You're now a member of the Syndicate.

data.name: TargetStartupFounderFail
data.value: You were offered a job for an "idea" and illusory stock options, but you preferred stability.

data.name: TargetStartupFounderSuccess
data.value: You signed an offer at a startup for a stake in the company and smoothies on Fridays. Corporate ideals are forgotten.

data.name: TargetSuicide
data.value: You yourself don’t understand how, but for some reason you signed a letter of resignation of your own free will and gave it to the HR department. Now you are Evangelist.

data.name: TargetSwap
data.value: Suddenly, your priority tasks in the task tracker have been reassigned to a completely different project.

data.name: TargetBlackmailMasterFire
data.value: In the morning you discover that someone has hacked your email and leaked your personal correspondence to management... You will be called to the director's office.

data.name: AllBlackmailMasterFire
data.value: Looks like someone's going to be called in to speak to the principal soon...

data.name: TargetRaiderFire
data.value: In the morning, you discover that your KPI in the system is significantly lower than it should be. You're sure it's the competitors' doing. Get ready, you'll soon be laid off.

data.name: AllRaiderFire
data.value: There are rumors going around the office about an upcoming restructuring.

data.name: TargetAnticrisisManagerFire
data.value: You open your email and see: "You don't fit into the company's new paradigm." You've been hit with emergency budget cuts.

data.name: AllAnticrisisFire
data.value: Management issued a memorandum on staff optimization. We're likely down one employee.

data.name: TargetResurrect
data.value: The corporation showed you the door, but you immediately signed a shady B2B contract. You're back in business, but this time off-the-books. Now you are Outsourcer.

data.name: AllResurrect
data.value: A painfully familiar name appeared on the list of external contractors...

data.name: ExecutorProtect
data.value: You cleaned up the employee's personnel file and destroyed all of his questionable activity before anyone saw it and forwarded it to the Director.

data.name: TargetProtect
data.value: Your competitors were undermining you overnight, but someone in HR deleted the incriminating logs. Your reputation is clear.

data.name: TargetBlock
data.value: Your account was blocked due to "suspicious activity." You spent all night waiting for support, without doing anything.

data.name: TargetBlockBlocker
data.value: You tried to access a remote server, but one of the system administrators had already taken control and reset all your passwords!

data.name: TargetBlockSelf
data.value: Due to a stupid mistake, you accidentally banned your own access token and were left without admin rights for the entire night.
